title: Medisee Stone Griddle Cakes
description: A simple and delicious breakfast recipe using medisee and stone to make griddle cakes.
instructions: Grind the medisee in a food processor until it resembles oats.
In a large bowl, mix together the ground medisee, crushed stone, eggs, water, and salt.
Heat a griddle or frying pan over medium heat.
Drop the medisee mixture by 1/4 cupfuls onto the griddle.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the griddle cakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
